The site hero now uses a built-in SVG graphic (multi-feed grid + intelligence hub) by default.
Optional: set VITE_HERO_VIDEO_URL in .env to a single full-bleed MP4.

Previously used Pixabay stock loops (download again if you want local files):

  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2015/08/10/198-135846853_small.mp4   (ID 198)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2015/08/10/280-135879343_small.mp4   (ID 280)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2016/07/27/4037-176748881_small.mp4 (ID 4037)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2018/01/30/14025-254146871_small.mp4 (ID 14025)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2022/02/15/107773-678526591_small.mp4 (ID 107773)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2016/09/21/5598-185024745_small.mp4  (ID 5598)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2017/05/07/9010-216403624_small.mp4  (ID 9010)
  https://cdn.pixabay.com/video/2017/03/03/8105-207208961_small.mp4  (ID 8105)
